# OpenViking

> Open-source context database for AI Agents. OpenViking unifies memory, resources, and skills management for AI Agents through a file system paradigm.

- Source: https://github.com/volcengine/OpenViking

## design

- [Account 级 User / Agent 命名空间策略与共享 Session 设计方案](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/account-namespace-shared-session-design)
- [OpenViking 本地 Embedding Llama-cpp 设计文档](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/local-embedding-llama-cpp-design)
- [Memory Extractor Templating and Update Mechanism Optimization / 记忆抽取模版与更新机制优化](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/memory-extractor-optimization)
- [OpenViking 指标体系设计方案](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/metric-design)
- [OpenViking 多租户设计方案](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/multi-tenant-design)
- [OpenClaw Plugin 升级为真正上下文引擎的设计方案](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/openclaw-context-engine-refactor)
- [OpenClaw Context Engine Integration Design / OpenClaw 上下文引擎集成方案设计](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/openclaw-integration)
- [OpenViking 解析器两层架构重构](https://volcengine.github.io/OpenViking/design/parser-two-layer-refactor-plan)
